name: Red Snapper En Papillote
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Lay out four large pieces of aluminum foil, each approximately 18 inches by 18 inches. Ensure the foil is large enough to cover the fillets and fold over, leaving enough air space to form a large bag. Place one fillet on each piece of foil. Arrange one quarter of the scallops, shrimp, and mussels around each fish. Divide the garlic marinara sauce into four portions and cover each fish with one portion. Place one tablespoon of Cafe de Paris sauce over the garlic marinara. Fold the foil over, leaving plenty of air space. Seal the edges tightly.
3. Place on individual oven-proof platters and cook in oven for 12 minutes. Place platter on second platter for serving at the table. Open foil cross-wise to slit and fold back for easy eating.
